about.title: About InnerMeter
about.p1: InnerMeter is a platform offering various personality tests and engaging psychological content.
about.p2: Users can discover their tendencies, psychological type, and life flow through simple questions in a fun way.
about.p3: InnerMeter's content is designed to provide experiences for self-exploration and entertainment.
tests: Intuition vs. Logic in My Head
Teto vs. Egen — Which Are You?
At What Age Does Your Life Peak?
about.p4: InnerMeter aims to help people understand themselves in a more interesting way and share results with friends.
about.disclaimer: Fortune and divination content on this site is for entertainment purposes only.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: InnerMeter takes the protection of your personal information seriously.
privacy.p2: This site may collect only the minimum information necessary to provide our services.
privacy.p3: This information is used solely for generating test results and improving user experience.
privacy.p4: InnerMeter does not sell or share your personal information with third parties.
privacy.p5: Visit statistics may be collected through analytics tools such as Google Analytics.
privacy.p6: This information is used to improve the site and enhance content quality.
privacy.p7: Users may discontinue use of the site at any time.
privacy.p8Pre: For inquiries, please contact us via our
privacy.adText: InnerMeter uses Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google and third-party vendors use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this or other websites. You may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google Ad Settings.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.p1: For inquiries related to InnerMeter services, please send us an email.
contact.p2: We will respond as quickly as possible.

Each spirit reader has a different voice and interpretation.
Choose the one that calls to your heart.
ui.footerNote: Life Turning Point · Love Fortune · Wealth Fortune · Path to Success
ui.formTitle: Tell me your date of birth
ui.formSubtitle: The more accurate, the deeper the reading
ui.turningSubtext: Your life's flow changes around this age
ui.shareText: I got my K-Shaman fortune reading 🔮 Find out yours too!

baby_bosal.title: Spirit of Innocence
baby_bosal.vibe: Friendly & intuitive, like a cheerful big sister

chunshin_doryeong.title: Spirit of the Sky
chunshin_doryeong.vibe: Strong & direct, a bold celestial warrior

baby_bosal.summary: Hmm~ looking at your flow, you're definitely a {{flow}} type! I can see something big shifting around age {{ta}}. Before then, things might feel stuck... but there's a reason for it, I promise.
baby_bosal.inborn: Here's the thing about you~ once your energy door opens, you just keep on rising! Sure, you might've had some tough patches early on, but all of that becomes your greatest strength later. Even if it's hard right now, hang in there~
baby_bosal.turning: Your life really changes around age {{ta}}, for real! It's not just a vague feeling — around then, something big shifts: your job, relationships, or even where you live. Don't be scared. Ride that wave!
baby_bosal.success: After age {{sa}}, things start falling into place in society~ Recognition starts coming in, and so does financial stability. When that moment arrives, all the hardship before will finally make sense.
baby_bosal.love: For love~ your energy comes in STRONG around ages {{la0}}, {{la1}}, and {{la2}}! The people you meet around these times could be seriously meaningful. Don't you dare let them pass you by!
baby_bosal.wealth: Financial fortune gradually stabilizes from age {{ws}} to {{we}}~ Instead of trying to make it big all at once, it's best to build steadily. Don't rush it~
baby_bosal.warning: Around ages {{wa0}} and {{wa1}}, please be a little careful! If you rush decisions or act on emotion during these times, you might regret it. Just pause for a moment and think it over. I'm rooting for you!

sunnyeo_bosal.summary: Your fortune flows gently... you carry the destiny of a {{flow}} path. Around age {{ta}}, I sense the currents of your life opening up beautifully in a new direction.
sunnyeo_bosal.inborn: You were born with an energy that, once your fortune's gate opens, flows endlessly without ceasing. Even if the path ahead seems unclear right now, know that good energy continues to surround you. Please, do not rush.
sunnyeo_bosal.turning: Around age {{ta}}, the energy of your life begins to flow anew. New connections and opportunities will naturally find their way to you during this time. Simply open your heart... and receive them.
sunnyeo_bosal.success: After age {{sa}}, the fruits of your long effort begin to ripen. The work you have quietly built up over time will finally shine in the light. Trust deeply in the process you are walking right now.
sunnyeo_bosal.love: The energy of love flows powerfully around ages {{la0}}, {{la1}}, and {{la2}}. The souls you encounter during these times are not mere coincidences — they may be deep, destined connections. Keep your heart open.
sunnyeo_bosal.wealth: The flow of wealth slowly and gracefully stabilizes from age {{ws}} to {{we}}. If you approach each small blessing with gratitude and sincerity... abundant energy will naturally follow.
sunnyeo_bosal.warning: Around ages {{wa0}} and {{wa1}}, please exercise great care in your decisions and relationships. Do not rush. First quiet your heart, then choose. These are periods that require wisdom to pass through gracefully.

chunshin_doryeong.summary: {{flow}} — that's you. Age {{ta}} is your turning point. Prepare yourself before that moment arrives. That's where your path divides.
chunshin_doryeong.inborn: Your innate energy is strong. Once your flow opens, nothing stops it. But you tend to carry everything alone — put some of that down.
chunshin_doryeong.turning: Age {{ta}}. This is the turning point. You need to lock in your direction right here. Don't waver. Miss this window, and the next opportunity is a long way off.
chunshin_doryeong.success: Achievement starts arriving at age {{sa}}. Everything you've built before shows results then. Don't let your guard down here. Keep pushing.
chunshin_doryeong.love: Love energy hits hard at ages {{la0}}, {{la1}}, and {{la2}}. When the opportunity comes during those times — don't hesitate. Just go. Overthinking means losing everything.
chunshin_doryeong.wealth: Wealth fortune opens from age {{ws}} to {{we}}. During this window, make decisive moves — investment, business, something. But absolutely no gambling. Build it clean.
chunshin_doryeong.warning: Ages {{wa0}} and {{wa1}} — watch out. Reckless judgment here means deep regret. Stay sharp in these periods and you can seize what comes next.

musog_in.summary: Looking at your life flow — you're a {{flow}} type. Around age {{ta}}, your fortune starts to wake up. Before that, there may be some blockages.
musog_in.inborn: Looking at your innate energy, your willpower is strong. You don't give up easily, you keep going steadily — and that's your biggest weapon.
musog_in.turning: Around age {{ta}}, your fortune makes a big shift. The flow changes after this period — don't be afraid of that change. You need to embrace it.
musog_in.success: After age {{sa}}, I see a flow of social stability and achievement coming in. Prepare well for this period and things will open up even wider.
musog_in.love: Looking at your love flow — strong connections come in around ages {{la0}}, {{la1}}, and {{la2}}. Don't overlook the people you meet during these times.
musog_in.wealth: Financial flow gradually stabilizes from age {{ws}} to {{we}}. Don't let greed take over during this period — that would scatter everything you've built.
musog_in.warning: Around ages {{wa0}} and {{wa1}}, be careful with your judgment. When making decisions during these times, think twice, three times, and listen to the people around you.

beopsa.summary: You carry the destiny of a {{flow}} path. Around age {{ta}}, a significant turning point arrives in the flow of your life. Prepare yourself well for this time.
beopsa.inborn: Within you is a quiet, unshakeable strength. Though it may not be visible on the surface, you were born with an energy that always finds its center, no matter how great the difficulty.
beopsa.turning: Around age {{ta}}, the direction of your life will be determined. Do not rush. Think deeply, and choose with great care.
beopsa.success: After age {{sa}}, the fruits of long effort begin to become visible. Remember — the achievements of this time are not born from greed, but are the reward for your sincerity.
beopsa.love: The connections of love will arrive around ages {{la0}}, {{la1}}, and {{la2}}. Do not try to force them. Simply follow the heart that opens naturally during those times.
beopsa.wealth: From age {{ws}} to {{we}}, wealth stabilizes. To one who abandons greed and works with honesty, wealth will always return. Do not spend this period carelessly.
beopsa.warning: Around ages {{wa0}} and {{wa1}}, you must exercise caution. Do not rush your judgment. For any important decision, give it time and reflect deeply.

What's Your Pet's

home.subtitle:
Discover your pet's hidden nature
in just 15 questions!

result.heading: {{label}} Test Result
result.saveError:
Image save failed 😢
Try taking a screenshot instead!

q1.text: When your owner gets ready to go out, you…
q1.a0: Run to the door excitedly, trying to come along
q1.a1: Wag your tail and show your belly for praise
q1.a2: Follow them around sniffing—maybe there's a treat?
q1.a3: That's fine, I'll just stay here on my own

q2.text: During a walk, you meet another dog. You…
q2.a0: Rush over to sniff and invite them to play
q2.a1: Wag your tail and instantly make a new friend
q2.a2: Barely notice—you're busy sniffing the ground

q3.a0: Grab it, shake it, and toss it around wildly
q3.a1: Bring it to your owner to play together
q3.a2: Sniff it to check if it's edible
q3.a3: Give it one sniff, then lose interest

q4.a0: Can't wait—pace circles in front of your bowl
q4.a1: Prefer making eye contact with your owner over eating
q4.a2: Finish the meal and lick the bowl for more
q4.a3: Eat if it's there, wait patiently if not

q5.text: Your owner sits on the sofa. You…
q5.a0: Squeeze in right next to them
q5.a1: Seize the chance and jump up to claim a spot
q5.a2: Wait nearby hoping for a snack
q5.a3: Rest on your own bed, doing your own thing

q6.text: A stranger visits the house. You…
q6.a0: Bark, charge over, sniff, and explore them
q6.a1: Wag your tail and immediately show your belly
q6.a2: Hide somewhere and keep barking from a distance
q6.a3: Don't care—you were napping and keep napping

q7.a0: Go over, lick them, and stay glued to their side
q7.a1: Bring a toy to cheer them up
q7.a3: Something feels wrong—you freeze and just stare

q8.a0: Run away until caught, then give up
q8.a1: Can't avoid it, so you just stand there
q8.a2: Tremble through it while staring at the treat
q8.a3: Refuse to go anywhere near the bathtub

q9.text: You accidentally have an indoor accident. You…
q9.a0: Tuck your tail when you see your owner's expression change
q9.a1: Don't even realize it was wrong and keep playing
q9.a2: Obliviously go over and lick your owner
q9.a3: Watch from a distance while your owner cleans up

q10.text: After being alone for a long time, your owner comes home. You…
q10.a0: Jump, bark, and greet them with your whole body
q10.a1: Unleash an explosive wave of affection
q10.a2: Sniff their bag for snack clues
q10.a3: Happy to see them, but just give a small tail wag

q11.text: Free run time at the park! You…
q11.a0: Sprint full speed, exploring everything in sight
q11.a1: Keep running up to people to say hello
q11.a2: Hunt the ground for anything that might be food
q11.a3: Walk a little beside your owner, then rest

q12.a0: Explore the house and play with toys
q12.a1: Hang around your owner's clothes or bag to smell them
q12.a3: Nothing special to do, so you sleep

q13.a0: Respond quickly and get excited about it
q13.a1: Try hard because you love your owner's praise
q13.a3: Pretend not to hear at first, then comply

q14.text: A strange sound during your walk. You…
q14.a1: Press close behind your owner's legs
q14.a2: Stop, check it out, then calmly walk on
q14.a3: Don't care—you were sniffing something interesting

q15.text: Right now, what makes you happiest?
q15.a0: Running and playing with my owner
q15.a1: The whole family together, cuddle time
q15.a3: Sleeping quietly in my own spot

active.title: The Energetic Adventurer
active.summary: Run, explore, adventure—this pup needs action to be happy!
active.description: A high-energy explorer who loves dashing around and discovering new things all day long. The more walks and playtime, the happier this dog gets. When bored, they may chew things or get mischievous—so daily exercise is a must!
active.trait1: Always sniffing out new places and smells
active.compatibleOwner: An active owner who loves outdoor activities
active.ownerTip: Daily exercise is essential. Walks, running, and frisbee are perfect!

social.title: The Affectionate Charmer
social.summary: My owner is my whole world—I'm happiest when we're together!
social.description: An incredibly sociable pup who draws energy from love and attention. Being alone can be tough for them. They instantly befriend anyone they meet and have a magical ability to win everyone over!
social.trait0: Loves physical affection from their owner
social.compatibleOwner: An owner who stays home often and expresses affection freely
social.ownerTip: Alone training may be needed. Give plenty of attention and love!

foodie.title: The Ultimate Foodie
foodie.summary: Nothing beats food—give me snacks and I'll do anything!
foodie.description: Food is the greatest motivator—nothing can top a tasty treat! This pup learns tricks quickly when snacks are involved, has a super-sensitive nose for food, and lights up brightest in any food-related situation.
foodie.trait1: Can sniff out food like a pro
foodie.trait2: A genius dog the moment a treat appears
foodie.compatibleOwner: An owner who manages meal schedules and enjoys treat-based training
foodie.ownerTip: Watch out for overeating! Weight management is key to good health.

calm.title: The Relaxed Independent
calm.summary: I'm just fine alone—my pace matters most
calm.description: An independent and laid-back pup who doesn't mind alone time. They value their own rhythm and dislike being pushed around. Thanks to their calm and stable nature, they make the best low-maintenance roommate!
calm.trait1: Values their own routine and personal space
calm.compatibleOwner: A busy owner who respects their dog's autonomy
calm.ownerTip: Don't force play. Respect your dog's pace and preferences!

anxious.title: The Sensitive Worrier
anxious.summary: Everything new is scary... I only trust my owner
anxious.description: A sensitive soul who startles easily and gets anxious around new things. Strangers, loud noises, and unfamiliar places take getting used to. But once trust is built, they are fiercely loyal and deeply bonded.
anxious.compatibleOwner: A patient, calm owner who understands sensitivity
anxious.ownerTip: Introduce new things slowly and build confidence with positive reinforcement!

q1.text: When your owner gets up in the morning, you…
q1.a0: Stroll over gracefully and circle around them
q1.a1: Dash to the window to look outside
q1.a2: Step on their face or meow loudly for breakfast
q1.a3: Watch quietly from a corner, then disappear

q2.a0: Approach elegantly, eat a couple bites, and leave
q2.a1: Use your paw to drag the bowl toward you
q2.a2: Sometimes you just don't care about food
q2.a3: Creep up slowly then snatch the food quickly

q3.text: A new object appears in the house. You…
q3.a0: Go straight over to sniff and investigate it
q3.a1: Watch from afar, then slowly approach
q3.a2: Pretend not to care, then check it out when nobody's watching
q3.a3: Push it off the edge to see what happens

q4.text: Your owner is watching TV. You…
q4.a0: Sit right in front of the screen and block the view
q4.a1: Quietly observe your owner from a corner
q4.a2: Climb onto their lap and claim the spot
q4.a3: Something moving outside is way more interesting

q5.text: Your owner is working at the keyboard. You…
q5.a2: Bat at the moving cursor on the screen

q6.text: A stranger tries to pet you. You…
q6.a2: Stay still—but swat their hand if they touch without permission

q7.text: Your owner waves a toy (wand, ball). You…
q7.a0: Wait patiently for the right moment, then attack wildly
q7.a1: Play enthusiastically for a bit, then lose interest
q7.a2: Stare intensely, then quietly walk away
q7.a3: Not interested unless it's actually fun to you

q8.text: A rainy day at home. The vibe is…
q8.a0: Sit by the window listening to the rain
q8.a1: Take an elegant nap on the sofa
q8.a2: Suddenly start sprinting laps around the house

q9.a1: Climb onto their lap and start grooming
q9.a2: Leave your room because of the noise

q10.text: Late at night you get most active. What do you do?
q10.a0: Knock everything off every surface in the house
q10.a2: Chill in your spot and sleep
q10.a3: Watch wildlife outside through the window

q11.a1: Explore every corner of the house
q11.a2: Climb somewhere high and observe everything
q11.a3: Nap and then groom yourself as usual

q12.a0: The windowsill or a high shelf
q12.a1: Inside a dark box or drawer
q12.a2: The center of your owner's bed
q12.a3: Anywhere in the house—you roam freely

q13.a2: Lick your owner's hand, then lick your own paw

q14.text: You discover an object your owner uses. You…
q14.a0: Sniff it and claim it as your territory (cheek rub)
q14.a1: Tap it with your paw then push it off
q14.a2: Climb inside or sit on top of it

q15.text: Right now, when are you happiest?
q15.a0: Looking down over the whole house from up high
q15.a2: When my owner gives me attention only when I want it
q15.a3: Spending quiet time alone with no interruptions

noble.title: The Elegant Aristocat
noble.summary: I own this home—and I never lose my dignity
noble.description: A high-class cat with impeccable standards. They don't show affection to just anyone, but when they trust someone, they offer a very special bond. Every move is pure elegance, and they would never compromise their dignity.
noble.trait1: Shows affection only to the chosen few
noble.trait2: Has firm personal routines and standards
noble.compatibleOwner: An owner who respects feline independence and provides a quiet environment
noble.ownerTip: Don't force cuddles. Wait for the cat to come to you on their terms!

free.title: The Free-Spirited Soul
free.summary: My life, my rules—please don't interfere
free.description: An untamed, free spirit who isn't bound by rules or routines. They enjoy alone time and dislike being forced into anything. But when they feel like it, they'll approach you warmly—an unpredictable charm all their own.
free.trait2: Happiest when they have free space
free.compatibleOwner: A busy owner who trusts and respects their cat
free.ownerTip: Provide hiding spots and high perches (cat tower) for them to explore!

boss.title: The House Boss
boss.summary: Everything here is mine—human, do your job!
boss.description: This cat knows exactly what they want and has the owner operating on their schedule. Affection is deployed strategically—when needed, and with maximum effect. They are fully aware they run this house.
boss.trait1: Considers themselves the most important being in the house
boss.compatibleOwner: An owner with a good sense of humor who accepts the cat's authority
boss.ownerTip: Set clear boundaries—but being too strict will backfire!

hunter.title: The Natural Hunter
hunter.summary: Anything that moves is my prey—living by instinct!
hunter.description: Sharp senses and strong hunting instincts define this cat. They react immediately to any movement and come fully alive when playing with toys. They thrive in an environment full of stimulation and movement.
hunter.trait1: Finds pure joy in toy hunting
hunter.trait2: Loves running around in open spaces
hunter.compatibleOwner: An owner who loves interactive play with wand toys or motorized toys
hunter.ownerTip: Satisfy their hunting instincts with diverse toys and puzzle feeders!

observer.title: The Cool Observer
observer.summary: I see everything—I watch before I act
observer.description: A careful, analytical cat who observes quietly before making any move. They don't act hastily—they take time to understand before doing anything. Quiet but intensely aware of everything happening around them.
observer.trait1: Quiet but always aware of surroundings
observer.trait2: Loves looking down from a high vantage point
observer.compatibleOwner: A quiet owner who respects the cat's space and pace
observer.ownerTip: Set up a cat tower or high shelf as their personal observation deck!

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.desc: The page you requested does not exist.
